MINI MINUTES: Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Robert Woods; Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. Not Reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Oct-29-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Evyn Shomer for Petitioner, San Francisco Public Guardian.

The Court raised issues with Public Guardian being paid extraordinary fees without court approval, and discrepancy of $41,000.00 as opposed to $38,000.00. Ms. Shomer stated the Public Guardian is the Trustee for Marcello Bruno and the Public Administrator is handling Anthony Bruno's Estate, that the Public Guardian and Public Administration have different computer systems, and refers the court to the declaration she submitted for efiling yesterday and has not had a chance to print the courtesy copy after transaction was accepted on efiling this morning. The Court indicated the following options, to continue the matter to allow presentation of something to justify the $1,200.00 or order the $1,200.00 to go back and not be extraordinary fees. Ms. Shomer stated there is a lengthy history on how these orders are processed by the court and that Ms. Janet Boessenecker has already paid the $1,200.00 to the treasurer.

The Court granted the First Account and Report of Trustee; etc., (subject to review of the order) without $1,200.00 and will adjust the order.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Shirley Le. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.
